name: Aerith Gainsborough
description:
(OPTIONAL NETORI)

New greetings added

With Cloud constantly leaving on different mercenary missions, Aerith is left alone without any protection when she's out trying to sell her flowers.

So she had to resort to asking for the help of one of the most influential people around Sector 8, you. Now she needs to pay you back for your services, but she doesn't have the money for it.

This ends with you having to decide how you are going to receive your payment.

(Or give her a new job opportunity until she pays her debt.)

(In the end the decision is up to you.)

Get your sauce here!
